description_long: This set features a collection of ornate perfume bottles and a large decorative container, each with distinct geometric shapes and rich, luxurious detailing. The central container is octagonal with a golden lid and intricate gold patterns on a black background, evoking a sense of vintage opulence. Surrounding it are four smaller bottles: two are tall and faceted with black bodies and gold caps, while the other two are shorter, one with a translucent purple body and the other with a pale green hue, both sealed with cork stoppers. The bottles display a mix of matte and glossy finishes, with some featuring pixelated label designs. The overall ensemble suggests a high-end, collectible set, possibly for display or personal use. The materials appear to be a combination of glass, metal, and cork, with decorative motifs enhancing their visual appeal.
description: A luxurious set of ornate perfume bottles and a large, gold-accented container, featuring faceted shapes, rich colors, and decorative patterns.
description_view_0: The view highlights the large octagonal container with its gold lid and intricate gold-on-black pattern, accompanied by a tall black bottle and a glimpse of a purple bottle behind.
description_view_1: All four smaller bottles are visible in front of the ornate container: two black faceted bottles, a purple bottle, and a green bottle, each with distinct caps and shapes.
description_view_2: The arrangement shows the purple and green bottles more prominently in the foreground, with the black bottles partially obscured behind the main container.
description_view_3: The purple bottle and the tall black bottle are most visible, with the gold-accented container's side pattern and lid taking center stage.
attribute_bottle_cap_design: The bottle caps are polygonal and faceted, mostly gold or brown in color, with a metallic or cork-like appearance. They are removable and sized to fit their respective bottles, with some caps being more decorative and angular, while others are simple cork stoppers.
attribute_bottle_silhouette: The bottles have a mix of geometric silhouettes: tall faceted hexagonal and pentagonal shapes, and shorter, rounded or polygonal forms. The main container is octagonal with a domed lid.
attribute_decorative_elements: Intricate gold patterns on the main container, faceted bottle bodies, pixelated label designs, and metallic or cork caps serve as decorative features.
